name: Professional Services (Zimbabwe)
definition: Firms selling professional expertise and regulated practice services: legal, accounting and audit, engineering, architecture, surveying, IT, consulting, real estate and related practices.

subSectors.name: Accounting, audit and tax
subSectors.description: Accounting firms, auditors and tax advisors.

subSectors.name: Engineering and built environment
subSectors.description: Consulting engineers, architects and quantity surveyors.

subSectors.name: Real estate services
subSectors.description: Estate agencies, valuers and property managers.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Partner-led firms with small professional teams.
National firms and network member firms.

officialSizeThresholds.note: No official firm-size classification was verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design. Professional council registration regimes are declared as research gaps rather than described.
